CREATE TABLE test_table (id INT, name STRING, age INT);
COPY INTO test_table FROM 'data.csv' ON SERVER;
COPY INTO test_table FROM 'data.csv' USING DELIMITERS '|', '\n', '' NULL AS 'NULL';
COPY INTO test_table FROM 'data.gz' ON CLIENT;
COPY 10 RECORDS INTO public.test_table FROM 'data.txt';
COPY INTO test_table (id, name) FROM 'data.tsv' USING DELIMITERS '\t', '\n', '';
COPY INTO test_table FROM 'data.bz2' ON SERVER USING DELIMITERS '|', '\n', '' NULL AS 'NULL';
COPY INTO test_table (age) FROM 'data.xz' USING DELIMITERS '|', '\n', '' WHERE id < 100;
COPY INTO test_table (id, name, age) FROM 'data.csv' ON SERVER BEST EFFORT;
CREATE TABLE temp_table (id INT, name STRING);
INSERT INTO temp_table SELECT id, name FROM test_table WHERE age > 30;
COPY INTO temp_table FROM 'temp_data.txt' ON SERVER;
DROP TABLE IF EXISTS temp_table;
COPY INTO test_table (id, name) FROM 'invalid_data.csv' ON SERVER USING DELIMITERS '|', '\n', '';
COPY INTO test_table FROM 'data.lz4' ON SERVER USING DELIMITERS '|', '\n', '' NULL AS 'N/A';
CREATE TABLE another_table (col1 STRING, col2 INT);
INSERT INTO another_table SELECT name, age FROM test_table WHERE id IN (SELECT id FROM test_table WHERE age < 30);
COPY INTO test_table FROM 'data.txt' ON CLIENT USING DELIMITERS '|', '\n', '' REJECTED AS 'REJECTED_DATA';
COPY 5 RECORDS INTO another_table FROM 'more_data.csv' USING DELIMITERS '|', '\n', '' NULL AS 'NULL';
COPY INTO test_table FROM 'multi_data.gzip' ON SERVER;
